visual_findings: The protected top-view lane correction restored the real CAD staged run: CAD, dimension, reference, and strict style gates are green or pass_with_warning.

The visual drawing still fails: the angled hole/radius/thread callout group remains over the left/top area of the top view and is not placed like the same-name reference drawing's compact blue callout group.
Generated dimensions are closer to manufacturing intent than the previous AutoDimension-like layout, but the top-view annotation stack is still visually heavy and would require drafter cleanup.
API/style pass is supporting evidence only; the application Drawing Review UI screenshot remains the final acceptance gate.
cases.required_next_action: Implement explicit hole/radius/thread callout placement against the reference right-side callout area, or demote the imported stacked callout and recreate concise leader notes outside the top-view box, then rerun 006 and UI screenshot review.

acceptance_rule: A drawing is not accepted until the application Drawing Review UI screenshot is visually judged PASS against the same-name reference drawing.
